cases.title: TS-21f: Instructor permitted nav set excludes all /admin/* routes
preconditions: Bootstrap complete; seeded Instructor with session:read and report:read per roles-permissions §2.2
API running; Instructor authenticated via session cookie
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me with Instructor session and capture permissions array
Resolve permitted nav descriptors for InstructorLayout via filterPermittedNav or equivalent module
Assert every returned route matches /sessions, /reports, or instructor sub-routes only
Assert zero descriptors with route prefix /admin
GET /api/v1/users with Instructor session
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden with errorCode Forbidden per roles-permissions §2.5
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 TS-21f and BR-14 satisfied: instructor chrome never includes cross-role admin destinations; API guard denies admin surfaces backing omitted nav items

cases.title: usePermittedNav omits nav descriptors when required permission absent from user set
preconditions: Nav descriptor catalog loaded from roles-permissions §2.3a (StudentLayout, InstructorLayout, AdminLayout)
filterPermittedNav module boundary available for integration test without browser
steps: Invoke filterPermittedNav with Student permissions [checkin:submit, attendance:read (self)]
Assert returned items include Điểm danh → /check-in and Lịch sử → /history
Assert zero items with route prefix /admin, /sessions, or /reports
Invoke filterPermittedNav with Instructor permissions [session:read] only (report:read absent)
Assert Buổi học → /sessions present; Báo cáo → /reports absent from result array
Invoke filterPermittedNav with full TrainingOfficeAdmin permission set
Assert all admin sidebar items from §2.3a present including Trang chủ, Người dùng, Xuất CSV
cases.expected: BR-14 module boundary: usePermittedNav omits nav items user lacks; cross-role prefixes never co-mingle in filtered descriptor set

cases.title: Nav item → permission map §2.3a drives omission for sidebar, bottom nav, and hub cards
preconditions: Nav descriptor table from roles-permissions §2.3a and app-layout-components §5.3, §6.2, §7.2 loaded
filterPermittedNav and filterHubCards integration APIs available
steps: For each StudentLayout bottom-nav item, assert required permission from §2.3a is evaluated before inclusion
For each InstructorLayout sidebar item, assert session:read or report:read gate applied
For each AdminLayout sidebar item, assert matching permission (user:read, roster:read, report:export, policy:write) required
Invoke filterHubCards with admin permissions excluding policy:write
Assert Chính sách card absent from hub descriptor result (not present with disabled flag)
Invoke filterHubCards for Student and assert only check-in and history cards returned
cases.expected: BR-14 scope all layout chrome: sidebar, bottom nav, and hub quick-link cards all omit unauthorized destinations per shared permission map

cases.title: GET /auth/me returns role and permissions consumed by nav chrome filtering
preconditions: Seeded Student, Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin with standard role permission sets
Valid session cookies for each role; API at /api/v1
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me with Student session cookie
Assert HTTP 200; body role Student; permissions include checkin:submit and attendance:read
GET /api/v1/auth/me with Instructor session
Assert HTTP 200; role Instructor; permissions include session:read
GET /api/v1/auth/me with TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Assert HTTP 200; role TrainingOfficeAdmin; permissions include user:read (all) and report:export
For each role, resolve filterPermittedNav output and assert every visible nav item's required permission is present in auth/me permissions
cases.expected: HTTP contract for GET /auth/me: permission set mirrors API guards and is the sole input to BR-14 nav omission logic per roles-permissions §2.4 UI route guard

cases.title: RBAC negative: Student and Instructor denied admin routes backing omitted nav items
preconditions: RbacNegativeMatrix fixture per testing-plan §5 with Student and Instructor sessions
Representative admin endpoints matching AdminLayout nav: GET /users, GET /admin/reports, POST /admin/export
steps: For each admin endpoint in matrix, invoke with Student session
Assert HTTP 403 for every request; no institution-wide data in response body
Repeat matrix with Instructor session for /admin/users, /admin/rosters, /admin/reports, /admin/export
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden or ExportNotAllowed per roles-permissions §2.5
Assert Instructor retains HTTP 200 on scoped routes GET /sessions and GET /reports when assigned
cases.expected: NFR-11 rbac-negative coverage for BR-14: non-admin roles cannot access admin API surfaces; nav chrome omission aligns with API denial matrix

cases.title: Boundary: Instructor without report:read omits Báo cáo from sidebar and hub — not disabled
preconditions: Instructor test user provisioned with session:read only (report:read explicitly absent)
filterPermittedNav and filterHubCards integration APIs available
steps: Load Instructor permission set and assert report:read not granted
Invoke filterPermittedNav for InstructorLayout
Assert sidebar contains Buổi học only; Báo cáo item absent from array (no disabled placeholder entry)
Invoke filterHubCards for /sessions instructor hub
Assert Tạo buổi học mới present but Báo cáo / Báo cáo điểm danh card absent
Direct GET /reports with Instructor session returns HTTP 403 ReportAccessDenied or Forbidden
cases.expected: BR-14 boundary inverse: partial permission set omits report nav and hub destinations entirely; direct URL still denied — showing disabled link would violate BR-14

cases.title: Browser-journey: instructor layout chrome contains zero href matching /admin
preconditions: Instructor user authenticated in browser
Instructor on /sessions instructor role home
steps: Navigate authenticated Instructor to /sessions
Query all anchor elements within InstructorLayout chrome (sidebar, TopBar, RoleHomeHub)
Assert zero href attributes match /admin or /admin/* regex
Resize viewport below md and open hamburger drawer sidebar; re-scan anchors
Direct navigate browser to /admin/users
Assert ForbiddenPage rendered inside RootLayout without AdminLayout sidebar or admin nav links
cases.expected: Tag-specific browser-journey hint satisfied: AC-18a and TS-21f — instructor chrome contains zero /admin links; forbidden direct URL shows 403 page without nav leak per BR-14

cases.title: Tag-specific component: forbidden AdminLayout sidebar items omitted from DOM not disabled
preconditions: Bootstrap complete; TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated in browser
Test admin user missing policy:write permission (or equivalent scoped fixture)
steps: Navigate browser to /admin with permission-reduced admin session
Inspect AdminLayout SidebarNav DOM via accessibility snapshot
Assert Chính sách (/admin/policy) nav item is absent from DOM (not present with aria-disabled or disabled attribute)
Assert permitted items such as Trang chủ and Người dùng remain visible and clickable
Assert RoleHomeHub omits Chính sách NavCard when policy:write missing
Direct-navigate to /admin/policy and assert ForbiddenPage without policy nav leaked in chrome
cases.expected: Tag-specific component hint satisfied: BR-14 requires unauthorized nav items omitted from DOM — not disabled, not shown — for sidebar and hub cards

cases.title: Student chrome never renders admin links; direct /admin/users shows ForbiddenPage
preconditions: Student authenticated in browser on /check-in
steps: While logged in as Student, inspect StudentLayout chrome (AppHeader, BottomNav) for any /admin href
Assert zero /admin links in bottom nav and page chrome per AC-18b
Navigate browser directly to /admin/users
Assert ForbiddenPage with Vietnamese permission message visible
Assert StudentLayout (not AdminLayout) wraps the forbidden page
Assert no admin sidebar items rendered anywhere in DOM
cases.expected: AC-18b browser outcome: BR-14 cross-role rule — student chrome never displays admin navigation; direct forbidden URL returns ForbiddenPage

cases.title: Browser-journey: visible nav chrome matches GET /auth/me permission matrix per role
preconditions: Seeded Instructor with session:read and report:read; web app and API running
Instructor authenticated in browser
steps: Fetch GET /api/v1/auth/me permissions for authenticated Instructor session
Navigate browser to /sessions and collect visible SidebarNav link labels and hrefs
For each visible nav item, assert required permission from roles-permissions §2.3a is present in auth/me permissions
Remove report:read from fixture (or use scoped test user) and reload /sessions
Assert Báo cáo nav item disappears from DOM entirely
Assert Buổi học remains visible because session:read still granted
cases.expected: Tag-specific browser-journey hint satisfied: nav chrome derived from same permission matrix as API guards — visible items exactly match granted permissions per BR-14

cases.title: Student BottomNav renders only permission-gated items — no instructor or admin routes
preconditions: Student authenticated in browser with checkin:submit and attendance:read (self)
steps: Navigate browser to /check-in
Inspect BottomNav pill navigation DOM
Assert Điểm danh link to /check-in present
Assert Lịch sử link to /history present
Assert zero links to /sessions, /reports, or any /admin/* route
Assert no nav items rendered with disabled or aria-disabled state for forbidden routes
cases.expected: BR-14 StudentLayout scope: bottom nav shows only permitted student routes; cross-role destinations omitted not disabled per app-layout-components §5.3

cases.title: Instructor chrome omits Xuất CSV nav; export API returns 403 ExportNotAllowed
preconditions: Instructor authenticated via session cookie
Admin export nav item requires report:export per §2.3a
steps: Resolve filterPermittedNav for InstructorLayout and assert zero items with route /admin/export
POST /api/v1/admin/export or equivalent CSV export endpoint with Instructor session
Assert HTTP 403 with errorCode ExportNotAllowed and Vietnamese message per roles-permissions §2.5
GET /api/v1/auth/me with Instructor session and assert report:export not in permissions
cases.expected: BR-14 and BR-09 alignment: export nav item omitted for non-admin; API export denial matches omitted chrome per NFR-11 nav negative matrix
